evals.prompt: Write ad copy for a dog grooming business in Seattle called 'Pawfect Grooming'. They offer full grooming, nail trims, and teeth cleaning. They have 4.8 stars on Google with 200+ reviews. They've been in business for 12 years. Target ad group: 'Dog Grooming - Seattle'.
evals.expected_output: RSA copy with 2-3 variants, each with a distinct messaging angle. Every headline must show character count and be <= 30 chars. Every description must show character count and be <= 90 chars. Pin positions should be indicated. Variants should be named by their angle (e.g., 'Trust & Experience', 'Value & Convenience').
expectations: Generates at least 2 distinct RSA variants with named messaging angles
Every headline shows a character count
Every description shows a character count
At least one headline includes Seattle (location specificity)
At least one headline references the 4.8 star rating or 200+ reviews (social proof)
At least one headline references 12 years in business (trust signal)
Pin positions are indicated (at least H1 pinned to position 1)

evals.prompt:
I want to A/B test my ad copy for the 'Roof Repair' ad group. Current ad has 2.1% CTR over 500 clicks. Here's the current ad:
H1: Roof Repair Services
H2: Licensed & Insured
H3: Call Now for a Quote
D1: Professional roof repair services for residential and commercial properties. Fast, reliable service.
D2: Licensed, bonded, and insured. Over 20 years of experience. Free estimates available.

Can you create a challenger variant?
evals.expected_output: Creates a challenger variant with a clearly different messaging angle. Specifies the test methodology: run both ads in the same ad group, minimum 100 clicks per variant or 2 weeks. Names the variable being tested. Recommends deploying both paused and enabling simultaneously.
expectations: Creates a challenger variant with a distinctly different angle from the current ad
Names the variable being tested (e.g., 'urgency vs trust', 'benefit-led vs feature-led')
Specifies minimum test duration (2 weeks or clicks threshold)
Recommends deploying both ads in the same ad group
Specifies the success metric (CTR and/or conversion rate)
Character counts shown for all new headlines and descriptions
